overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic survival game showing a character walking through a dark, rainy forest at night with a flashlight. The scene features heavy rainfall, dense coniferous vegetation, and atmospheric lighting creating a tense, immersive environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense coniferous forest trail in heavy rainstorm

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the forest path holding a flashlight to illuminate the way through the heavy rain and darkness

entered.detail: tall evergreen trees forming the forest canopy on the left side of the path
tall evergreen trees forming the forest canopy on the right side of the path
thick bushes and ferns lining the left edge of the dirt path
thick bushes and vegetation lining the right edge of the dirt path
narrow dirt trail winding through the forest, illuminated by the character's flashlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, rainy night in a dense forest. The character walks along a narrow dirt path illuminated only by their flashlight, with tall pine trees and thick underbrush pressing in on both sides. Heavy rain falls steadily, creating a hazy atmosphere and wet ground surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with prominent rock formation

events.description: large mossy boulder comes into view on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: character continues walking along the path, passing a large rock formation on the right side while maintaining steady forward progress

entered.detail: large gray rock covered in moss situated beside the path on the right side

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a large mossy boulder emerges on the right side of the path, becoming a prominent landmark. The dense forest continues with tall pines visible in the background. The heavy rain persists, with the flashlight beam cutting through the darkness and illuminating the wet rock surface as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail approaching waterfront or clearing

events.description: forest opens up on the right revealing a view of water body in the distance

agents.ego_description: character continues along the winding path as the forest opens up to the right, revealing a view of water while navigating through dense ferns

entered.detail: distant view of a lake or river visible through the trees on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the rock formation and continues through an area with dense fern coverage on the forest floor. As the path curves, the right side of the forest opens up around the 50-second mark, revealing a distant view of a body of water through the trees. The heavy rain continues to fall as the character approaches this more open area of the forest.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, rain-drenched forest that gradually opens up to reveal a distant vista. It begins on a narrow dirt path where a flashlight beam cuts through the darkness, illuminating tall pine trees and thick underbrush under a steady downpour. As the character progresses, the beam sweeps across a large, mossy boulder that emerges from the shadows on the right side of the trail. The scene then shifts as the character moves past the rock formation into an area of dense ferns, with the path curving to gradually peel away the thick vegetation. Finally, the forest opens up on the right, revealing a glimpse of a body of water through the trees as the heavy rain continues to fall.
